title: Unstable SMP "Zone" Mechanic
description: Adds the "Zone" seen in FlameFrag's video on the Unstable SMP
body:
**This Datapack adds the "Zone" Mechanic seen in FlameFrag's video on the Unstable SMP**

**The "Zone" is activated when the player lands multiple hits on an opponent in quick succession.**
**You'll know you have entered the "Zone" when your screen turns red**

![What the "Zone" looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7729077751f25f90757ac46ffb9dd48dcfd51e5d_0.webp)

_**While in the "Zone" you are slightly faster, deal slightly more damage, and take slightly less damage**_
